description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are marked modified because DEFAULT_REF_ID was renamed from 'storybook_internal' to 'storybook_internal_eval'.
Search and Tree story files also import Sidebar.tsx (and thus consume DEFAULT_REF_ID), making them directly impacted by the constant rename.
Refs and SearchResults stories are transitively affected via the import graph rooted at Sidebar.tsx and the changed DEFAULT_REF_ID constant.
Filter, FilterPanel, Explorer, and TreeNode stories are transitively affected through Sidebar.tsx's export of DEFAULT_REF_ID.

Manager-main stories are transitively affected because the main manager layout imports the sidebar module chain containing the renamed DEFAULT_REF_ID constant; catch-all for any remaining flagged stories.

description: Typical first-party file edit (1-line const rename)

clusters.rationale: These stories directly import Sidebar.tsx and are the primary consumers of the renamed DEFAULT_REF_ID constant ('storybook_internal' → 'storybook_internal_eval').
Search and Tree stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively and may use DEFAULT_REF_ID when resolving the default ref context for story navigation and filtering.
Refs and Explorer stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively; the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename affects how the internal ref is identified when rendering ref panels and explorer trees.
FilterPanel, Filter, SearchResults, and TreeNode stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively and depend on the ref ID constant indirectly through shared sidebar data structures.
Manager Main stories import Sidebar.tsx transitively as part of the full manager layout, making them indirectly affected by the DEFAULT_REF_ID rename.
Catch-all for any flagged stories not matched by a more specific signature above.

clusters.rationale: These stories directly showcase the Button component whose file received the comment-only change (AGENT_EVAL_MARKER added to Button.tsx).
Manager-scoped component stories (TextFlip, TourGuide, container menus) that directly import Button.tsx in their render graph.
Overlay stories (Popover, Modal, Tooltip, TooltipNote, PopoverProvider, TooltipProvider) transitively import Button.tsx through shared UI primitives.
Core component library stories (Tabs, Toolbar, Select, Bar, Card, Collapsible, ToggleButton, ActionList, etc.) are transitively affected via Button.tsx in the shared component tree.
All manager-namespaced UI stories (sidebar, layout, notifications, settings, iframe, panel, mobile, etc.) are transitively affected because the manager shell imports Button.tsx.

Catch-all for addons (docs, accessibility, vitest, actions, onboarding), component-testing, controls, and highlight stories that are all transitively affected by the Button.tsx comment change via the shared component library.

clusters.rationale: All manager-* stories directly import theming/index.ts (the changed file) and are thus directly modified.
All components-* stories directly or transitively import theming/index.ts due to styled-component usage across the shared components library.
All addons-docs-* stories transitively consume theming/index.ts through shared UI primitives.
All other addons-* stories (accessibility, vitest, pseudo-states, onboarding, actions) transitively import theming/index.ts through shared components.
Component-testing stories transitively import theming/index.ts through shared UI components used in the interactions panel and toolbar.
Overlay and select-* stories directly import theming/index.ts via emotion-styled components in the overlay and select packages.
Catch-all for any flagged stories not matched by a more specific prefix — all share the same root cause of a marker constant added to theming/index.ts.
